description: As a cashier using uniCenta oPOS, process a sale for a walk-in customer. The application is open at the login screen — select a user to log in, then from the main POS sales screen, add the following items to the order: 1x Coca-Cola Classic 12oz ($1.29), 2x Lay's Classic Potato Chips ($4.49 each), and 1x Heinz Tomato Ketchup ($4.49). After adding all items, complete the transaction by processing a cash payment. The total before tax should be $14.76.
